metadata.purpose: Risk identification, mitigation strategies, and residual risk tracking

risk.description: Operator fusion produces numerically incorrect results due to floating-point reordering or intermediate precision loss.
risk.mitigation: Extensive numerical equivalence tests (epsilon < 1e-6). Test with edge cases: very large, very small, NaN, Inf, zero-element tensors. Disable fusion per-pattern if any test fails.
risk.residual: Low — fusion disabled for any failing pattern until fixed.

risk.description: Auto-parallelism introduces data races or non-deterministic results due to incorrect dependency analysis.
risk.mitigation: Conservative dependency analysis — only parallelize when provably independent. Run parallel vs sequential comparison 1000x. Use thread sanitizer if available.
risk.residual: Low — parallelism disabled globally if any race detected.

risk.description: New MIR passes increase compile time beyond 15% threshold on standard benchmarks.
risk.mitigation: Benchmark after each new pass. Profile with cargo flamegraph. Optimize hot paths. If threshold exceeded, make the pass opt-in only.
risk.residual: Medium — some passes may be opt-in rather than default.

risk.description: Global NameInterner conflicts with existing TypeInterner, causing subtle bugs in type resolution.
risk.mitigation: Keep interners completely separate (different types, different storage). Full test suite regression. No shared state.
risk.residual: Low — interners are independent by design.

risk.description: Context window overflow during AI execution causes "Error during execution" and lost work.
risk.mitigation: Strict token budgets per phase (80K max). Handoff packets between phases. /compact before new phases. Subagents for exploration. Never read entire codebase.
risk.residual: Low — mitigated by context governance protocol.

risk.description: Linearity annotations interact unexpectedly with existing borrow checker, causing false positives or missed violations.
risk.mitigation: Linear checking is a separate pass on top of borrow checking, not integrated into it. Extensive tests for interaction patterns. Opt-in only.
risk.residual: Medium — edge cases may require iteration.

risk.description: Thread pool in C runtime causes issues on Windows (primary development platform) due to pthreads vs Windows threads.
risk.mitigation: Use platform-agnostic threading (C11 threads or #ifdef for Windows CreateThread). Test on Windows specifically. Fall back to sequential if threading unavailable.

risk.description: stacker or insta crate introduces version conflict with existing Cargo.toml dependencies.
risk.mitigation: Both are widely used, stable crates. Pin versions. Test cargo build before proceeding.

risk.description: with-block desugaring interacts poorly with existing error handling (Result + ? operator), creating confusing type errors.
risk.mitigation: Clear documentation of how with-blocks interact with ?. Targeted error messages for common mistakes. Extensive test coverage.

risk.description: Git's link.exe shadows MSVC linker on Windows, causing build failures.
risk.mitigation: Set LINK environment variable to MSVC linker path. Document in .dev/ files. Already known issue.
